---
title: "Architecture"
author: "UIAO Modernization Program"
date: today
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
format:
  html: default
  docx: default
  pdf: default
  gfm: default
---

# Modernization Atlas: Unified Architecture

This document outlines the four-plane model driving the agency's IT transformation. By decoupling identity from physical location, we create a system that is both more secure and more agile.

## Architectural Convergence
The following diagram visualizes the intersection of user identity and network location.

![Unified Architecture](./images/unified_arch.png)

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![Architecture Diagram](https://www.plantuml.com/plantuml/png/ZPJBRjim44Nt-eg1kqYxS9gY3H1qKOJMmpMGXr4PQRUqE949Kno1fEowGV-zbFoIxLIETWBlp3rpH-AjTTougb21dKjTSiCBcF9idXkgj0X9aO5tIVEq50AVUQLSGjezy0A16SdR7PWnjDmKVnfyPjTXwt10Hg3vtwd1p76TA-oMbPwHvsT4cjmP1SkSN4YtwbQ5L9IaKRitejUvd07lacoXEZLrmbs2VOx7sunlagiaVYNB4-4W-NAmzbrQPrlk4pihZRZZKsxVm2csobUs46o6WDv8U5iF2MF5DSBxoGpXukUCBZxqu2NOnG8zzgSo_jEDu2E4qcO4epJk0RV0sgenAPcj8DQvrDWSH_KF4LtVN0KC-lrl_lqhfCE9RxEpdl3S1d_tJ4m8WzPAdHzHeS4Jhf5-fgcYtp0Qi_l6SH0CTawZCQGPbMYztzCTUpZmULoWKVnmzE-qFB5OpnlwFDNAEWWzDfh6AWwYnYhsLWcV6fa1y-2vBhoctI8MtZ1TIfVDO4p6DTL943VLYQz--kNfV6uPBssbk9EaswWJL5YWCol_hMXdI6sX7wSMpQBH7sEdfQhqt0--NjqzQUbepJqCXd1vkOxe1tBLTzBVImcYg6-ppM4z5Ak4T717pO9kKGj_z_q3)

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

### Core Pillars

* **Identity Plane (The "Who"):** Azure AD and Cisco ISE provide unified identity through Security Group Tags and Conditional Access policies, feeding into the central Policy Engine.
* **Addressing Plane (The "Where"):** Infoblox IPAM delivers automated IP scope and VLAN assignment, eliminating manual spreadsheet tracking.
* **Overlay Plane (The "How"):** Cisco Catalyst Center orchestrates VXLAN fabric assignments, translating policy decisions into edge switch port configurations.
* **Telemetry Control Plane (Observation):** Splunk and Azure Monitor provide real-time feedback loops and audit logging, enabling proactive threat detection and performance optimization.

### Architectural Principles
- Identity-driven routing
- Telemetry-informed decisions
- Cloud-first path selection
- Zero Trust segmentation
- Modular, incremental modernization
## UIAO Pipeline Test Diagram

![UIAO Pipeline Flow](http://www.plantuml.com/plantuml/png/JSun3eCm30NGtQTmsRb2HGWTAbNgW7e0bxWGDIJ8CPLw-wQmC7rBJ__BJLOINUS09vruPbm2-GY1NugQKFmuAJelFAXF4U1_K1m3OzMdLGR6_fkLvrmXPJH7VrpD7MqItgWzqkNZ7STIlj5xPtlaZlBqJ2HkN-q03DRrkMoqMrgmMtRGS7Jb-Hy0)
